MatchState.title: MatchState
MatchState.description: Represents the overall state of a match, including scores, timer, events, and team names.

events.description: List of match events, like goals, cards, fouls, and notes.

Scores.title: Scores
Scores.description: Represents the score of the match

Fouls.title: Fouls
Fouls.description: Represents the number of fouls committed for each team.

home.description: Number of fouls committed by the home team.

away.description: Number of fouls committed by the away team.

Timer.title: Timer
Timer.description: Represents the state of the game timer.

startTime.description: Timestamp of the last time the timer was started or resumed.

elapsedSeconds.description: Total elapsed seconds in the current period.

isRunning.description: Indicates whether the timer is currently running.

firstHalfEndSeconds.description: Timestamp of when the first half ended.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents a single event that occurs during the match.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Event entity (timestamp).

time.description: Formatted time when the event occurred (e.g., '45+2').

TeamNames.title: TeamNames
TeamNames.description: Represents the names of the teams.

league.description: Name of the league or tournament.

place.description: Venue or location of the match.

assistant1.description: Name of the first assistant referee.

assistant2.description: Name of the second assistant referee.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information, including approval and admin status.

isApproved.description: Indicates if the user has been approved by an administrator.

isAdmin.description: Indicates if the user has administrative privileges.

sessionId.description: A unique token to identify the current active session and prevent multi-device login.

definition.description: Stores the complete state for a single match.
